hooks.command: input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.path // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); branch=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.branch // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -z "$path" ] || [ "$path" = "null" ]; then path="/tmp/claude-worktree-$$"; fi; git worktree remove "$path" --force 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -n "$branch" ] && [ "$branch" != "null" ] && [ "$branch" != "undefined" ]; then git branch -d "$branch" 2>/dev/null || true; git worktree add "$path" -b "$branch" 2>/dev/null || git worktree add "$path" 2>/dev/null || true; else git worktree add "$path" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; echo "$path"

input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.path // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$path" ] && [ "$path" != "null" ]; then git worktree remove "$path" --force 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0
